title: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now available (Beta)
body: Databricks Container Services for standard compute is now in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). You can now specify a Docker image when creating standard compute on Databricks Runtime 18.3 or later, allowing you to use custom containers in shared compute environments. See [Databricks Container Services for standard compute](/aws/en/compute/custom-containers-standard).

ref_links.text: Databricks Container Services for standard compute
